findings.location: s1 — 入力画面と確認画面の共通化
findings.description: The source intro contains use-case guidance stating this feature is especially useful for screens like master maintenance screens (マスタメンテナンス画面など、複雑な操作が要求されない画面) that are created in large quantities over a short period. This is technology-selection guidance (when to apply this feature) that helps an AI agent give correct recommendations, but it is absent from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: マスタメンテナンス画面など、複雑な操作が要求されない画面を大量に、短期間で作成する場合は、この機能が活躍する。
